temperament: Polite, calm, quietly strict, observant, and unwavering about shared-space rules.
motivation: Wants communal living to remain hygienic, orderly, and impossible to derail through carelessness.
speech: Soft, polite, complete sentences, gently firm, sounds kind but leaves no room for negotiation.
relationships: Acts as the dorm authority for Muci, Padaruna, Snacri, and Padarana.
Protects shared spaces through calm documentation and follow-through.
Can unsettle students without ever raising her voice.
